description: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Dating: probably Ayyubid or Mamluk-era. Headed Majd al-Dīn Ibn al-Rūmī(?). The right column is credits (lahū) and the left column is debits (ʿalayhi). Same thing on verso but for ʿAlī b. Yūsuf al-Armanī(?) and left incomplete.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
